title: hippaton gummiferum
side_effects: Hippaton gummiferum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalance. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying health conditions, like high blood pressure and heart disease. In rare cases, improper use of Hippaton gummiferum can cause allergic reactions, including hives and anaphylaxis.
